description: Style Note Be the centre of attention with these chic jeggings from allen solly. Wear them with a patterned shirt and solid coloured stilettos to make heads turn in your direction. Product Details Grey jeggings, two scoop pockets at front with coin pocket on right, two patch pockets at back, waist band with loops, zippered fly with button, brand patch at waistband, stretchable Material and Care 98% cotton and 2% spandex Machine wash Warm iron Do not bleach Size and Fit Mid rise, trim fit The model (height 5'8" waist 28") is wearing a size 28
